data.name: 丘露庫醬和色色的實驗室
data.detailed_description:
幫助被神秘組織抓住，連裝備都被改造的色色的丘露庫醬!

從色色的實驗室逃脫吧!

對於時不時會逃跑且無法完全控制住裝備，造成設施損壞的丘露庫醬，

研究員抱著頭苦惱地向她提出了建議......

要是丘露庫醬通關研究員設置的15個關卡的話，就放她離開!

丘露庫醬究竟能不能平安地通關呢??

▽遊戲概要

利用俯瞰視角來躲避敵人，並完成解謎。

要是被敵人抓住，就會進入色色的點陣動畫。

能量低於50%就會進入色色的點陣動畫。

另外，也有能量充沛時就會被抓住的......

・點陣動畫×動作解謎

・機械姦・異種姦等H場景多達15種

・機械、植物、生物三種不同的關卡風格

・回想模式

data.short_description: 迴避各種機關與怪物，從色色的實驗室中逃脫吧! 幫助被神秘組織抓住的丘露庫醬，利用2D俯瞰視角來躲避敵人， 並完成解謎。要是被敵人抓住，就會進入色色的點陣動畫。
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Turqu-chan in the Hentai Laboratory
data.detailed_description:
Help the Turqu-chan escape from a mysterious organization

that has captured her and modified her equipment into a horny style!

Turqu-chan, who often escapes, causing facility damage, has been given a suggestion by the researchers...

If she can clear the 15 stages set by the researchers, they will let her go!

Can Turqu-chan successfully escape?

▽Overview

Top-down perspective. Evading enemies and solving puzzles.

If you get caught by enemies, a Hentai pixel animation will be triggered.

If energy drops below 50%, the Hentai pixel animation will also be triggered.

Additionally, there are scenes where Turqu-chan can be caught when her energy is abundant...

  • - Pixel animation combined with action puzzles

  • - 15 different H-scenes including mechanical and alien

  • - Three distinct stage styles: mechanical, botanical, and biological

  • - Memory mode

data.short_description: This is a mini puzzle escape game that offers both simplicity and challenge, with rich pixel art animations! Assist "Turqu-chan, the disarmed Valkyrie," in her escape from this erotic laboratory!
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
